question: Besides the two main controling functions, what other functions of the earphones can I operate?
content: Besides music and call controls, the Hydrabuds ANC can operate these other functions: phone voice assistant by pressing and holding the left earbud until the first beep; Spotify Tap by pressing and holding the right earbud until the first beep; Ambient Awareness/ANC mode cycling by pressing the left earbud; Low Latency Mode on/off by pressing and holding either earbud until the second beep; new-device pairing by turning Bluetooth off on the connected device or by pressing and then pressing and holding either earbud to drop the connection; and reset functions, with the earbuds disconnected from Bluetooth and out of the case, by holding 6 seconds for factory reset or 10 seconds for hardware reset.
ret: "Besides music and call controls, the Hydrabuds ANC can operate these other functions: phone voice assistant by pressing and holding the left earbud until the first beep; Spotify Tap by pressing and holding the right earbud until the first beep; Ambient Awareness/ANC mode cycling by pressing the left earbud; Low Latency Mode on/off by pressing and holding either earbud until the second beep; new-device pairing by turning Bluetooth off on the connected device or by pressing and then pressing and holding either earbud to drop the connection; and reset functions, with the earbuds disconnected from Bluetooth and out of the case, by holding 6 seconds for factory reset or 10 seconds for hardware reset.",[]
notes: Answered from the Hydrabuds ANC Earbud Controls and More Controls sections. No images used because the answer is a direct list of supported controls and gestures.
